3213380.name: 呪いの手紙　cursed letter
3213380.description:
“The fact that you are reading this letter means that I am probably already dead.”

“I can't let these 'cursed letters' get out.”

“I have to seal everything here.”

“Only you, my best student, can do that.”

Cursed Letters” is a first-person horror casual action game.

Your master has asked you to seal the cursed letters.

However, they are very powerful.

The only way to counter them is with the sealing technique.

You should continue reading the letters while being on the lookout for the “curse” that may come at any moment.

■How to proceed

○Read the letters!

Let's read many letters.

The operation is simple: “Press the space key!“

Among the letters, there are some cursed letters.

What will happen if you read the cursed letters?

That is, of course, ......

○ Sealing!

The power of the cursed letters should cause a terrifying experience.

Then immediately press the “E key”!

The horror will surely be gone.

○ You will have a morning!

Read the letter to the end, and you will greet the morning.

Conversely, if you fail to read the letter to the end, ......?

○What happens if you fail to seal the letter?

What happens if you receive the curse directly?

That might be one experience. ......

*The current English version is a machine-translated text.

Please wait a little longer as we have asked an expert to translate it:)
